display.name: OpenClaw — Full Comprehensive Dashboard
display.description: Comprehensive OpenClaw dashboard combining the Overview panels (token usage, message flow, queue & session health, error logs) with all panels from OpenClaw — Error Monitoring (agent run errors, error rate, errors by model/channel/provider, slowest operations, errored span detail).

filter.expression: openclaw.channel in $channel AND openclaw.model in $model AND openclaw.provider in $provider
openclaw.token = 'input' AND openclaw.channel in $channel AND openclaw.provider in $provider
openclaw.token = 'output' AND openclaw.channel in $channel AND openclaw.provider in $provider

display.name: Total Agent Run Errors
display.description: Count of openclaw-gateway spans with an error in the selected range.

display.name: Errors by Channel & Provider
display.description: Errored spans grouped by openclaw.channel and openclaw.provider.

display.name: Slowest Operations (p95 duration)
display.description: p95 span duration grouped by operation name. Slow operations often precede timeouts and errors.

display.name: Recent Errored Spans (detail)
display.description: Detailed list of the most recent errored openclaw-gateway spans — drill into individual failed runs by session, message and model.

display.name: Run Error Rate (%)
display.description: Errored spans as a percentage of all openclaw-gateway spans.

display.name: Total Agent Runs
display.description: All openclaw-gateway spans (run/message volume) in range.

display.name: Messages Processed (by outcome)
display.description: openclaw.message.processed counter total, grouped by outcome. Non-completed outcomes indicate failed/aborted message runs.

display.name: Agent Run Errors Over Time
display.description: Time series of errored openclaw-gateway spans. Watch for spikes.

display.name: Run Error Rate % Over Time
display.description: Errored spans / total spans per interval, expressed as a percentage.

display.name: Errors by Model
display.description: Errored spans grouped by openclaw.model — surfaces which model is associated with the most failed runs.

display.name: Steps per thread: current avg completed (value)
display.description: average openclaw.harness.items.completed per harness.run over the selected range.

display.name: items started vs completed vs active
